Мастер фраза для определения максимально: It seems that at some point, Merigold simply lost interest
На лугу возле берега я встретил мальчика:
In a meadow by the coast, I met a boy, Simen. 
He asked me to build a hut for him to wait out the night. 
The first can be found near the destroyed bridge, 
the second - in the bushes, the third - in the glade near 
the road to the shore.
Крыша вышла слишком хлипкая. На востоке:
The roof came out too weak. 
To the east of here, lies the Dark Forest. 
The trees there seem to be sturdies. 
Maybe I could make something from their branches?
Я закончил строить шалаш для Симена. У в:
I finished building a hut for Simen. 
At the entrance to the Dark Forest, we found his sheep's
bell. The boy asks me to find her. 
So, what should we do?
Для зелья Мэригольд требуется три компон:
The potion for Merigold requires three components: 
- bud of a Dracocephalum; 
- sap from the leaves of the Lily of the Valley;
- crushed burnet root. 
All of these plants can be found in the meadow 
where I met Simen. I need to ask him what these herbs  
look like. 
Shepherds are good at this.
Я принес первый компонент, на очереди ещ:
I brought the first component, there are a couple more 
to find.
Второй ингредиент найден. Осталось совсе:
The second ingredient has been found. 
Just one more.
Третий ингредиент найден. Осталось совсе: The third ingredient has been found. Almost there.
Я помог Мэригольд приготовить зелье. Теп:
I helped Merigold prepare the potion. 
Now she will tell me where she saw the sheep.
Сок из листьев Лилии долин: Sap from the leaves of a Lily of the Valley
The potion for Merigold requires three c:
The potion for Merigold requires three components: 
- bud of a Dracocephalum; 
- sap from the leaves of the Lily of the Valley;
- crushed Sanguisorba root. 
All of these plants can be found in the meadow 
where I met Simen. I need to ask him what these herbs  
look like. 
Shepherds are good at this.
У костра Симен рассказал про свою сбежав:
By the fire, Simen told me about his runaway sheep. 
He asks me to find her. Looks like I'll have to venture 
into the Dark Forest to do that.
В своих поисках я встретился с женщиной-:
In my search, I met a she-fox, Merigold. 
She asked me to bring her herbs for alchemy in 
exchange for information about the sheep.
Овца находится в заброшенном доме на зап:
The sheep is in an abandoned house west of the 
Dark Forest.
Ханна провалилась в хлев. Нужно как-то п:
Hannah fell into the barn. 
I need to get to her somehow.
Я добрался до овцы. Она в панике и не сл:
I got to the sheep. 
She is in panic and won't listen to commands. 
I need to find a way to calm her down. 
Merigold says she knows a recipe for a sedative. 
Need to ask her about it.
Мэригольд изготовила зелье, которое долж:
Merigold has made the potion that should calm the 
sheep.
Зелье оказало... необычный эффект. По сл:
The potion had... an unusual effect. 
According to Merigold, it is temporary. 
I need to somehow establish contact with the 
sheep to make her go back to Simen.
Дело сделано. Можно возвращаться к Симен: Job done. Now I can return to Simen.
Find a way to open the door.
На опушке леса я встретил странную волчи:
I met an odd she-wolf at the edge of the forest. 
She had definitely seen humans before, barked like 
a dog and seemed to be understanding what I was 
saying. I was curious who she was, but we had a little 
fight. I wounded her and now she needs help.
Мэригольд оказалась не рада нашему появл:
Merigold was not happy to see us. 
She kicked me and and the "dog" out, but promised 
to help if I came back alone. 
I think it's best for my new friend to come stay with 
me for now.
quests_Я должен обустроить место для соб:
I have to arrange a place for the dog to
recovered. Needs a little work
Workbench.
Теперь я могу спокойно обговорить все с: Now I can calmly discuss everything with Merigold.
Отвести раненную волчицу к Мэригольд: Take the wounded she-wolf to Merigold
Отвести раненную волчицу к себе домой: Take the wounded she-wolf to my home
quests_Сделать Угол Ульфы и установить е: Make an Ulfa Corner and install it in the house
Дом, который подарила мне Мэригольд, сей:
The house that Merigold gave me is a sore sight. 
I need to go back there and work on it. 
To begin with, I will make a bed for the dog. 
I saw a workbench in the house, can work with that. 
Maybe there will be some simple materials nearby.
Кажется, в какой-то момент Мэригольд про:
It seems that at some point, Merigold simply lost interest
in this project, but she was able to achieve impressive 
results. 
It is worth checking if the miracle garden still works.
Я думаю, что Ульфа - дремлющая фурри. Ес:
I think that Ulfa is one of the sleeping furries. 
There's only one way to find out. 
I need to ask Merigold for that transformation potion, 
but be very careful.
Мэригольд согласилась дать мне пробуждаю:
Merigold agreed to give me the transformation potion 
if I helped her get rid of the smell in her house. 
She sent me to the Gloomy Grove, because 
Ghostflower blooms there at night. 
I need to collect three buds.
Мэригольд попросила меня убраться у нее: Merigold asked me to clean her house.
Я получил пробуждающее зелье, осталось т:
I received the transformation potion. 
All I need to do is test it on Ulfa.
Над землянкой Мэригольд клубится дым. Ну:
Smoke is curling over Merigold's house. 
Need to check if she's fine.
Произошло недоразумение, и Мэригольд пот:
There was an accident, and Merigold lost a whole jar of 
rare leeches. 
I promised her I'd get another one. 
I should cross the swamps and find a certain Fagop.
Я обещал зайти к Мэригольд, когда приду:
I promised to stop by Marigold's when 
I came to my senses.
Ох, как болит голова! Нужно понять, где:
Oh, what a terrible headache! 
I need to understand where I am. 
Are there any people here at all?
Путь к поселению людей сейчас отрезан. Н:
The path to the human settlement is now cut off. 
I have to wait for the bridge to be repaired. 
It must be done sometime soon, right?
Мне пришла в голову блестящая идея! Если:
"A brilliant idea has occurred to me! 
If the fog is weakening, it will soon be possible to 
to restore the island's maritime communications 
"to the rest of the world.
It would be worth going to the local government and 
cheering them with the news, and offer my unique 
navigator's skills!"
quests_Мне пришла в голову блестящая иде:
I came up with a brilliant idea!
If the fog weakens, it will soon be possible to
restore the sea communications of the island
with the rest of the world. Worth a visit to the local
administration, please them with this news and offer my
unique seafaring skills!
quests_Меня сочли сумасшедшим! Я застрял:
They thought I was crazy! I'm stuck at the fucking
border with a piece of paper that says that I am a 
crazy fisherman!
quests_Итак, мной наконец заинтересовали:
So, they finally got interested in me. 
A board will arrive from the capital soon, and they will 
listen to me.
quests_В настоящий момент квест завершен:
The quest is currently completed. 
Stay tuned to continue it in the next additions.
Рецепт зелья очень… необычный. Для него:
The recipe for the potion is very... unusual. It needs a 
special ingredient - I can get it behind the curtain.
Find a way to get into the stable.
Find out about the potion from Merigold.
quests_Я не сумасшедший, верно? Значит б:
I'm not crazy, right? 
So it will be easy to prove it to the doctor!
quests_Придти на второй сеанс послезавтр: Come to the second session the day after tomorrow
quests_\"Я не сумасшедший, верно? Значит:
"I'm not crazy, right? 
So it will be easy to prove it to the doctor!", I thought. 
How naive I was!
quests_В поселении лягушек большая эпиде:
There is an epidemic burst in the frogs settlement,
their children are suffering from a serious disease. 
Merigold knows how to overcome the infection,
but she needs access to the transmutator for this -
it's an alchemical cabinet that only humans have.
It is somewhere in the dungeon of the nearest outpost.
I promised her to see what I can do.

There is an epidemic burst in the frogs settlement,
their children are suffering from a serious disease. 
Merigold knows how to overcome the infection,
but she needs access to the transmutator for this -
an alchemical cabinet that only humans have.
It is located across this nymphomaniac shrink's
office. 
I'll have to go to her sessions and see
where this goes. This gorgon must have some 
weaknesses, after all.

There is an epidemic burst in the frogs settlement,
their children are suffering from a serious disease. 
Merigold knows how to overcome the infection,
but she needs access to the transmutator for this -
an alchemical cabinet that only humans have.
It is located across this nymphomaniac shrink's
office. 
I have to buckle up and come to Astrid's again. 
This time I won't let her take the initiative!

There is an epidemic burst in the frogs settlement,
their children are suffering from a serious disease. 
Merigold knows how to overcome the infection,
but she needs access to the transmutator for this -
an alchemical cabinet that only humans have.
It is located across this nymphomaniac shrink's
office. 
I've found it, and I'm sure I can use it if
I'm persistent enough. Gotta tell Mary about this.

There is an epidemic burst in the frogs settlement,
their children are suffering from a serious disease.
To help them, I have to fuck my therapist until she 
looses her consciousness. That's the deal!
quests_Отдать склянку с реагентом Мэриго: Give the reagent bottle to Merigold
quests_В поселении лягушек большая эпиде:
There is a big epidemic in the frog settlement, children
suffer from a serious illness. I got an important
ingredient for the cure, even though it was hard!
Time to give it to Merigold.
quests_Дом заброшен и в ужасном состояни:
The house is abandoned and in terrible condition.
I can't live like this! Just before to get to work, 
I need to clear the workplace first.

The house is abandoned and in terrible condition.
I can't even get enough sleep! It's time to get to
work!
First, I'll need resources.
I need to look for wood and stone in the neighborhood, 
so I can build something from it at the Workbench.
quests_Я оказался на торжестве в поселен:
I found myself at a celebration in a frog settlement.
Merigold said I need to blend in with the crowd.
Talk to people in the crowd.
Explore the caves in the east.
quests_Назвать отравителя или отправитьс: Call out the poisoner or go to bed.
quests_Меня отравили! Мэригольд уверена:
I've been poisoned! Merigold is sure that it was
Gubble, she wants to find evidence... Darn it!

I've been poisoned! Merigold is sure that it was
Gubble, she wants to find evidence. She sent me
to explore the caves in the east of the settlement.
Let's see what I find there.
quests_Я нашел настоящую улику! Это пуст:
I found a real clue! This is an empty rat poison flask.
Now it's time to return to Merigold.
quests_Теперь мне осталось собрать недос:
Now all I have to do is collect the missing
information and return to Merigold. I can try
to accuse one of the suspects or I can just wait
to see what the new day brings.
quests_Ну вот все и выяснилось. Настало:
Well, it came clear, after all. It's time
go back home now. I should go see Merigold.
quests_Я обещал помочь Тине развести все: I promised to help Tina bring all the children home.
I had a great time with Tina.
We can have walk once more!
Talk to Tina in the evening.
quests_Продолжение ветки в следующих обн: Romantic line to be continued in the next updates!
quests_Ждать ответа из Столицы: Wait for a response from the Capital.
quests_Встретиться со своим сопровождени: Meet your escort at the outpost
quests_Я столкнулся с людьми, которые до:
I have encountered the people who are supposed to
escort me to the Capital. They will be waiting for me
at the central gate of the Southern Outpost.
quests_Чиновник, который должен сопровож:
The official who is supposed to escort me to the Capital
went to Astrid and disappeared. I need to check on him.
quests_Пора отправляться с Винкинсом и П: Time to go to the Capital with Winkins and Peacock.
I need to set up a place for Roxy.
quests_Ханна чувствует себя ужасно из-за:
Hannah feels terrible about having to hide her true self
in her own home.
However, she is afraid to reveal herself to Grey. 
I promised her to think about what can be done.

Hannah feels terrible about having to hide her true self
in her own home. 
Things got worse when Grey, unaware of Hannah's 
nature, decided to sell her.
What do we do now?

Hannah feels terrible about having to hide her true self
in her own home. 
Things got worse when Grey, unaware of Hannah's 
nature, decided to sell her.
I promised Hannah to talk Grey out of the idea of
selling her.

Hannah feels terrible about having to hide her true self
in her own home. 
Things got worse when Grey, unaware of Hannah's 
nature, decided to sell her. 
I convinced Grey to put off the ​​selling on the condition 
that I help her out with the farm. 
I hope to use these days to prepare this farm owner for 
the shocking news.
quests_Проработать на ферме несколько дн: Work on the farm for a few days
quests_Ханна чувствует себя ужасно из-за:
Hannah feels terrible about having to hide her true self
in her own home. 
Things got worse when Grey, unaware of Hannah's 
nature, decided to sell her. 
I convinced Grey to put off the ​​selling on the condition 
that I help her out with the farm. 
I hope to use these days to prepare this farm owner for 
the shocking news. 
Grey already knows that I have a mysterious girl friend 
helping me with thefarm. Tomorrow I will tell Grey who 
she is.
quests_Меня заперли в номере, но, наверн:
They’ve locked me in a room, but I guess that was
to be expected. I do have important information, after all.
They promised that soon a hypnotist would visit to help
clarify my memories of the Fog. I just need to wait.
quests_Если я хочу, чтобы Совет увидел в:
If I want the Council to see me not just as a witness
but also as an experienced sailor, I need to prepare.
I must find more information about the Island
and the Fog.

If I want the Council to see me not just as a witness
but also as an experienced sailor, I need to prepare.
I must find more information about the Island
and the Fog. The librarian recommended I read
the textbook "History of the New Age".

If I want the Council to see me not just as a witness
but also as an experienced sailor, I need to prepare.
I must find more information about the Island
and the Fog. The textbook wasn’t much help, but maybe
I’ll find something better?

If I want the Council to see me not just as a witness
but also as an experienced sailor, I need to prepare.
I must find more information about the Island
and the Fog. I found a book called "The Lost Land."
This might be it.
quests_Меня заперли в номере, но я на ко:
They’ve locked me in a room, but I’m on the ship…
What does a hotel have to do with this? I was waiting
for someone called the hypnotist, but now I’m
hauling barrels.
quests_Голос говорит, что я должен собра:
A voice says I must collect memory crystals.
Who am I to argue?
quests_Меня заперли в номере, но, наверн:
They’ve locked me in a room, but I guess that was
to be expected. I do have important information, after all.
Anyway, the hypnosis confirmed my story. Now I just
have to wait for the local authorities to get their
act together.
quests_Перетащить бочки на палубу: Move the barrels to the deck
quests_Кажется, у меня теперь есть друг:
Looks like I have a new pen pal! I should check
on her tomorrow.
quests_Подойти к незнакомке в библиотечк: Approach the stranger in the library the next morning
quests_Кажется, у меня теперь есть друг:
Looks like I have a new pen pal! In my last note,
I asked her for a favor in return.
quests_Романтика: Незнакомка в библиотек: Romance: The Stranger in the Library
quests_По следам Туманоходца: In the wake of the Fogwalker
quests_Я встретил очень умную кошку и в:
I met a very clever cat in the library. I am convinced
she is a dormant furry. She pointed me to the right book 
— she is not only intelligent, but also well-read. It
would be even better if she could speak the human
tongue. The main thing is that she doesn’t get lost
somewhere out in the streets now.
quests_София действительно оказалась дре:
Sophia truly turned out to be a dormant furry. She has
transformed and now can’t get out of the wardrobe.
I promised to get her some clothes. Winkins said I
shouldn’t hesitate to ask if I need anything.

Sophia truly turned out to be a dormant furry. She has
transformed. She needs some time, but first I should
ask how she’s doing.
quests_София всю свою жизнь прожила в би:
Sophia spent her entire life in the library and knows
a great deal about the Island’s history. She claims that
I’ll learn more about the fate of the last expedition 
into the Fog if I explore the city sewers.
quests_Поговорить с Софи и отправляться: Talk to Sophie and go to sleep
quests_Еще раз придти к незнакомке завтр: Come back to the stranger again tomorrow
quests_София всю свою жизнь прожила в би:
Sophia spent her entire life in the library and knows
a great deal about the Island’s history. She claims that
I’ll learn more about the fate of the last expedition
into the Fog if I explore the city sewers. But first,
the lighting down there needs to be turned on. For that
I need to visit the local merchant and ask whether
he has a flask of luminescent fluid.
quests_Включить свет в канализации: Turn on the lights in the sewers
quests_Пройти дальше на север по канализ: Proceed farther north through the sewer tunnels
quests_Мы нашли тело Бенджамина Лора, че:
We found the body of Benjamin Lore — the man
who came closest to discovering a path through the Fog.
From his final note, we learned that he had a hideout
in the catacombs where he kept important records.
The hideout lies beyond an alchemical seal. Sophie
can break it, but she needs more info and time.
quests_Зайти в библиотеку, а потом отпра: Visit the library, then go to sleep
quests_Она сказала, что больше так продо:
She said this can’t go on like this anymore... So next time
we’re meeting in the backroom!
quests_Пикок считает, что Совет сознател:
Peacock believes the Council is deliberately stalling
my case. He decided to tease the higher-ups a little
and bring me out into their society.
quests_Посетить приём в особняке Хардвик: Attend the reception at Hardwick’s mansion
quests_Торговец из старого квартала рань:
The merchant from the Old Quarter used to go down
into the sewers to collect coins with rare impurities.
They can be sold for a good price if you know
the right people. Now he’s afraid to go down there
because of the monsters that have multiplied
in the sewers. If I find a few coins, he’ll cut me in.
quests_Найти пять старых монет в канализ:
Find five old coins in the sewers and bring them
to the merchant
quests_На приёме было много неприятных л:
The reception was full of unpleasant people and
heavy conversations. It is what it is, right?
Ah, to hell with it. Time to wash up and go to sleep!
